examples: Ovarian choriocarcinoma is one of the rarest gynecologic malignant tumors.
ABSTRACT Choriocarcinoma is one of solid tumors which are sensitive to chemotherapy.
Objective To analyze the clinical characters and prognosis of postpartum choriocarcinoma .
As it turns out, HCG is also produced in men suffering from a rare but aggressive form of testicular cancer called choriocarcinoma.
No one is exactly sure why HCG is secreted by choriocarcinoma tumors, but what is certain is that having this form of testicular cancer is extremely bad.
